title: okta_user
description: One Okta directory user, with MFA-enrollment count policies check today. Distinct from the cross-vendor user_record schema: okta_user carries factor count (not a single mfa_enabled boolean) and Okta-specific status semantics. A future unification under directory_user is a separate design decision.

status.description: Okta status: ACTIVE | PROVISIONED | SUSPENDED | DEPROVISIONED | LOCKED_OUT | PASSWORD_EXPIRED | RECOVERY | STAGED.

mfa_factor_count.description: Count of ACTIVE enrolled factors. > 0 implies MFA is available; full enforcement is policy-dependent.
